title: odontarrhena fragillima
intro: Odontarrhena fragillima, also known as the delicate toothwort or fragrant toothwort, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and loosen mucus in the lungs. The health benefits of Odontarrhena fragillima include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to support digestive health and reduce fever. Odontarrhena fragillima can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusate, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
